ddls:
CREATE TABLE "ipo_listings" (
  "ipo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each IPO listing */,
  "issuer_company" TEXT /* Name of the issuer company */,
  "issue_type" TEXT /* Type of issue (e.g., Mainline) */,
  "recommendation" TEXT /* Recommendation for the IPO (e.g., Apply) */,
  "listing_date" TEXT /* Date of the IPO listing */,
  "issue_size" TEXT /* Size of the IPO issue */,
  "subscribed" TEXT /* Subscribed amount for the IPO */,
  "issue_price" TEXT /* Price of the IPO issue */,
  "listing_exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the IPO is listed */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry or sector of the issuer company */,
  "listing_status" TEXT /* Current status of the IPO listing */,
  "issue_type_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the issue type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ipo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "ipo_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the IPO listing */,
  "current_price" TEXT /* Current price of the stock */,
  "listing_day_price" TEXT /* Price of the stock on the listing day */,
  "fifty_two_week_high" TEXT /* 52-week high price of the stock */,
  "fifty_two_week_low" TEXT /* 52-week low price of the stock */,
  "market_capitalization" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "daily_high" TEXT /* Daily high price of the stock */,
  "daily_low" TEXT /* Daily low price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock */,
  "percentage_change" TEXT /* Percentage change in the stock price */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_ipo_id FOREIGN KEY ("ipo_id") REFERENCES ipo_listings ("ipo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investor, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* User's password (hashed for security) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered on the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "ipo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the IPO being accessed */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., view, compare) */,
  "activity_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the activity */,
  "device_and_browser" TEXT /* Information about the device and browser used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_ipo_id FOREIGN KEY ("ipo_id") REFERENCES ipo_listings ("ipo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each IPO listing
Exchange where the IPO is listed
Industry or sector of the issuer company
Current status of the IPO listing
Brief description of the issue type
Price of the stock on the listing day
Daily high price of the stock
Daily low price of the stock
Percentage change in the stock price
Role of the user (e.g., investor, analyst, admin)
Date the user registered on the platform
Date and time of the user's last login
ID of the user performing the activity
ID of the IPO being accessed
Information about the device and browser used
